case_title: ERDENE CHULUUN BATOCHIR VS. FRITZ EVERICK WILKINS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BATOCHIR, ERDENE CHULUUN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WILKINS, FRITZ EVERICK PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BATOCHIR, ERDENE CHULUUN AS TO DEFENDANT WILKINS, FRITZ EVERICK
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID HUARD FILED BY BATOCHIR, ERDENE CHULUUN
RETURN OF CONTINUANCE ORDER - SENT TO FRITZ EVERICK WILKINS
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM ALAN SILVERMAN FILED BY BATOCHIR, ERDENE CHULUUN WILKINS, FRITZ EVERICK
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF BATOCHIR, ERDENE CHULUUN
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF BATOCHIR, ERDENE CHULUUN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-15-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-15-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ALAN SILVERMAN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT CERTIFIED MONGOLIAN INTERPRETER KHALIUNA HADEN PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
